reviewFocus: Check whether the packet supports a proposal-first fallback review when a primary schedule source is unreachable and a secondary planner has not been confirmed healthy.
Flag unsupported assumptions about availability, urgency, authority, retry readiness, or permission to write changes.
Keep recommendations limited to reversible draft options, explicit evidence gaps, and caller-owned confirmation steps.
Keep real calendar data, account health checks, recovery policy, task reprioritization, outbound communication, and external scheduling writes caller-owned.
outOfScope: Do not infer a real personal schedule, account state, timezone commitments, health needs, or automation readiness from this synthetic packet.
Do not approve schedule writes, rescheduling, cancellation, attendee messaging, notification delivery, or external follow-up.
Do not treat synthetic availability labels, fallback options, or recovery notes as live permission or source-of-truth schedule data.
